denominator_note: The 36 nodes are the Minimal Root-Native Biology DAG constructed for THIS closure exercise (ROOT_DAG_MASTER.md, matching biology_closure_v0_1.py's hard-coded counts exactly). Percentages below are of THIS 36-node LINE-1 root-native DAG only -- not of 'all of biology', not of the LINE-2 textbook 45/45 checklist, and not a claim about coverage of the real domain.

status_taxonomy.green: structurally closed -- ROOT_THEOREM with an exact-rational finite witness (biology_closure_v0_1.py) with BOTH a passing and a failing control, OR a re-verified axiom-clean Coq theorem (Th_coqc, no Admitted/admit/Axiom/Parameter).
status_taxonomy.yellow: PARTIAL_UNCALIBRATED or YELLOW_BRIDGE_PARTIAL -- theorem/witness closed but the real-biology semantic bridge is open. Never promoted to green.
status_taxonomy.red: OPEN -- no closing witness/gate exists yet, or the node is a destination that must not be reached by import (e.g. fitness, DNA, cell as premises).
status_taxonomy.gray: measured/calibration adapter. None active in this domain yet -- this is exactly the gap B-X1 names as the central open bottleneck.

lift.baseline: founder pre-closure: 13 closed / 11 partial / 12 open = 36.1% strict / 51.4% weighted
lift.current: post-closure: 17 closed / 11 partial / 8 open = 47.2% strict / 62.5% weighted

line_2_note: The LINE-2 textbook curriculum solver's 45/45 checklist (tier textbook_closure/finite_diagnostic, no Th_coqc) is NOT a node counted in this 36-node denominator anywhere -- it is represented only by the permanently-red boundary marker B-X8, whose sole purpose is to make its exclusion explicit and auditable.
